languages.original_text: "Expressing consensus. The lamentable pattern of irrational disposal of potential and resources is indeed characteristic of the Inquisition. I also note that the value of some knowledge does not justify the risk that it entails. Genetor Februs, you know this firsthand."

languages.text: "Выражаю согласие, прискорбный паттерн нерациональной растраты потенциала и ресурсов действительно присущ Инквизиции. Также вношу ремарку — ценность некоторых знаний не оправдывает сопряженный с ними риск. Генетор Фебрус, ты знаешь это из первых рук".

"Expressing consensus. The lamentable pattern of irrational disposal of potential and resources is indeed characteristic of the Inquisition. I also note that the value of some knowledge does not justify the risk that it entails. Genetor Februs, you know this firsthand."

"Expressing consensus. The lamentable pattern of irrational disposal of potential and resources is indeed characteristic of the Inquisition. I also note that the value of some knowledge does not justify the risk that it entails. Genetor Februs, you know this firsthand."

languages.text: «Expresando consenso. El patrón lamentable de la eliminación irracional de recursos y potencial es, efectivamente, característico de la Inquisición. También quiero hacer constar que el valor de algunos conocimientos no justifica el peligro que encierran. Genetor Februs, ha sido usted testigo presencial de ello».
languages.original_text: "Expressing consensus. The lamentable pattern of irrational disposal of potential and resources is indeed characteristic of the Inquisition. I also note that the value of some knowledge does not justify the risk that it entails. Genetor Februs, you know this firsthand."

traits.locale_text: «Expresando consenso. El patrón lamentable de la eliminación irracional de recursos y potencial es, efectivamente, característico de la Inquisición. También quiero hacer constar que el valor de algunos conocimientos no justifica el peligro que encierran. Genetor Februs, ha sido usted testigo presencial de ello».

languages.text: 「同意を表明します。潜在能力と資源を非合理的に処分するという嘆かわしいパターンは、確かに異端審問会に特徴的なものです。また、一部の知識の価値が、それに伴う危険を正当化しないことも指摘しておきます。ゲネター・フェブラス、あなたはそれを身をもって知っているはずです」
languages.original_text: "Expressing consensus. The lamentable pattern of irrational disposal of potential and resources is indeed characteristic of the Inquisition. I also note that the value of some knowledge does not justify the risk that it entails. Genetor Februs, you know this firsthand."

traits.locale_text: 「同意を表明します。潜在能力と資源を非合理的に処分するという嘆かわしいパターンは、確かに異端審問会に特徴的なものです。また、一部の知識の価値が、それに伴う危険を正当化しないことも指摘しておきます。ゲネター・フェブラス、あなたはそれを身をもって知っているはずです」

languages.text: “我对此表示赞同。对潜力与资源进行可悲的非理性浪费，确实是审判庭一贯的作风。不过我也注意到，有些知识的价值并不足以合理化其带来的风险。基因士费布鲁斯，对于这一点你应该深有体会。”
languages.original_text: "Expressing consensus. The lamentable pattern of irrational disposal of potential and resources is indeed characteristic of the Inquisition. I also note that the value of some knowledge does not justify the risk that it entails. Genetor Februs, you know this firsthand."

traits.locale_text: “我对此表示赞同。对潜力与资源进行可悲的非理性浪费，确实是审判庭一贯的作风。不过我也注意到，有些知识的价值并不足以合理化其带来的风险。基因士费布鲁斯，对于这一点你应该深有体会。”

languages.text: "Konsens bestätigt. Das bedauerliche Muster der irrationalen Opferung von Potenzial und Ressourcen ist in der Tat typisch für die Inquisition. Ich weise ferner darauf hin, dass die Erlangung von Wissen nicht jedes Risiko rechtfertigt. Das wisst Ihr selbst am besten, Genetor Februs."
languages.original_text: "Expressing consensus. The lamentable pattern of irrational disposal of potential and resources is indeed characteristic of the Inquisition. I also note that the value of some knowledge does not justify the risk that it entails. Genetor Februs, you know this firsthand."

traits.locale_text: "Konsens bestätigt. Das bedauerliche Muster der irrationalen Opferung von Potenzial und Ressourcen ist in der Tat typisch für die Inquisition. Ich weise ferner darauf hin, dass die Erlangung von Wissen nicht jedes Risiko rechtfertigt. Das wisst Ihr selbst am besten, Genetor Februs."

languages.text: « Affirmatif. La tendance lamentable à l'élimination de ressources et de potentiel est en effet caractéristique de l'Inquisition. Je note également que la valeur de certaines connaissances ne justifie pas le risque qu'elles font encourir. Vous le savez d'expérience, genetor Februs. »
languages.original_text: "Expressing consensus. The lamentable pattern of irrational disposal of potential and resources is indeed characteristic of the Inquisition. I also note that the value of some knowledge does not justify the risk that it entails. Genetor Februs, you know this firsthand."

traits.locale_text: « Affirmatif. La tendance lamentable à l'élimination de ressources et de potentiel est en effet caractéristique de l'Inquisition. Je note également que la valeur de certaines connaissances ne justifie pas le risque qu'elles font encourir. Vous le savez d'expérience, genetor Februs. »

languages.text: "Görüş birliğini ifade etme. Potansiyel ve kaynakların mantıksız bir şekilde elden çıkarılmasına dair bu acınası eğilim gerçekten de Engizisyon'un özelliğidir. Ayrıca bazı bilgilerin değerinin taşıdığı riski haklı çıkarmadığını da not düşüyorum. Genetör Februs, bunu ilk elden biliyorsunuz."
languages.original_text: "Expressing consensus. The lamentable pattern of irrational disposal of potential and resources is indeed characteristic of the Inquisition. I also note that the value of some knowledge does not justify the risk that it entails. Genetor Februs, you know this firsthand."
